research-light.reason: light research should favor lower-cost flash models

bounded-implementation.reason: bounded implementation defaults to flash and escalates to pro if needed

heavy-architecture.reason: hard architecture tasks prioritize stronger pro models

benchmark-floor.reason: floor benchmarks stay in the cheapest stable lane

deterministic_tool.reason: deterministic packets must run in tool lane and never call an LLM

free_api.reason: free_api packets prefer the cheapest stable flash-lite lane

premium_model.reason: premium packets prioritize stronger lanes and degrade by quota availability

local_model.reason: local_model is a placeholder lane until a local adapter is activated

ceo.reason: ceo planning and aggregation favors stronger premium reasoning

worker.reason: worker runs default to the cheapest useful execution lane

reviewer.reason: reviewer defaults to free_api and can escalate by packet stakes
